title: koeleria cristata var. arenaria
intro: Koeleria cristata var. arenaria, also known as sand bent or coastal hair grass, is a type of perennial grass that grows in coastal areas and sandy soils, characterized by its slender leaves and delicate flowers. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Koeleria cristata var. arenaria include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. The plant can be used in various herbal preparations, such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its safety and efficacy.
